notableEvents.label: Mookie Betts GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mookie Betts grounds into a double play, shortstop Alika Williams to second baseman Joshua Kuroda-Grauer to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Freddie Freeman out at 2nd. Mookie Betts out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Alex Freeland pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Alex Freeland grounds out softly to pitcher Kade Morris.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Cortes pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Cortes grounds out, second baseman Alex Freeland to first baseman Freddie Freeman.

notableEvents.label: Jeff McNeil pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jeff McNeil flies out to center fielder Andy Pages.
